title: United Scientific Supplies JMD150 Mortar and Pestle, Deep Form, 150 ml
description:
About this item
Country Of Origin: China
Model Number: JMD150
Item Package Dimension: 5.1968503884" L x 5.118110231" W x 4.1732283422" H
Item Package Weight: 1.67549608873663 lb
reviews_5s:
I wanted a mortar and pestal to crush spices as needed. It’s the perfect size. Quality is great. This would be good for crushing pills or anything.My mom always used a mortar and pestle to grind kitchen spices like black pepper and cumin. I've wanted one for a long time. The advantage is versatility. You can grind a small amount of spice, if needed, to any coarseness required. Much easier to control than an electric grinder. It can accommodate larger batches, but that is a bit of work. The porous surface makes it hard to clean completely. That's not necessarily an issue if you are just using it for spices. I rinse it off, then wipe with a paper towel. Very happy with the purchase.I use this at least 3 days a week in the kitchen, its outstanding as a spice grinder.

After a prior ceramic mortar and pestle broke I tried using electric grinders, molcajete, 'stylish' granite mortar and pestles, all were inferior for my needs.

It isn't huge and stores easily; and its light, easy to grab and use in hand. Its big enough that I haven't had divide anything for recipes, but I wouldn't try to make a batch of pesto or grind cocoa nibs into chocolate.

This thing grabs spices perfectly and doesn't have weird ridges to hide large particles. It is large enough to smash ginger and garlic, but the narrow diameter and high sides keep spice bits from flying out when breaking down cinnamon sticks or anise pods.

I do wish the pestle was a little shorter, or at least had a flatter back-end to nest into the palm. It's uncomfortable and unwieldy for that particular use style, but the added length/mass means that I rarely feel the need to put my arm that squarely behind it, the momentum can do most of the work.

Despite its excellent grip it wipes out easily and washes quickly. The glazed surface is super easy to clean, and the bare porcelain has not absorbed any permanent flavors or stains.

I'm a fan!I bought this mortar & pestle because it was less expensive than the one in the cooking department, but it is the exact same thing. For my purposes, it works great. I saw on some other reviews that the chief complaint was that the bottom of the mortar is not polished and therefore gets discolored by whatever you grind in it. For me, this would only be a problem if the flavor of the previously ground spice remained, but it doesn't. I find that the rougher texture of the bottom of the mortar helps grinds spices faster.Works better than any of my natural stone mortar and pestle.
I was able to grind dry ingredients into a talcum like powder. 👍
Finally I can have real Turkish coffee without paying a fortune.This is on par with what I work with in an analytical chemistry lab and the price was respectable.Very happy with this pestle and mortar. Interior surface of mortar is v. slightly rough, as it should be, as is the grinding face of the pestle. No fault lines in either item, so don't expect any breakages any time soon.Hey everyone, I cremate folks, it's necessary and fulfilling. Sometimes very very tiny folks cross my path. This item is perfect for reducing the tiny pieces of dry bone into fine powder. Your usage may vary.

I suggest getting a small brush to go with the m&p.Came fast and very well packed!! Beautiful set, will work out perfectly for my needs which are mostly for grinding up our dogs pills. Neither of our fur babies like to swallow their meds so the vet said grind them up and mix with a little food, works like a charm and this Morter and Pestle set will be a huge help in the process! The outside is glazed and inside is not, it was meant to be that way. I noted in other reviews some spoke of that, my old Morter and Pestle set were the same way but that set broke while moving. Happy to finally have this new set!This is my ride or die for making my colored acrylic powders 10/10 recommend it's made it so much more enjoyable to make my powders. It does stain BUT it doesn't mess with the next colors in my experience. I clean with alcohol between each color but I've ever just wiped it out with a paper towel and moved on to the next color and I've never had an issue. I really like the inside being "unfinished" or gritty and the pestle is also unfinished on the grinding part. Makes it very easy to grind
reviews_1s:
The item description specifically states:

Mortar And Pestle, Material Porcelain, Finish Glazed, Max. Temp. 1150 Degrees C, Diameter 90Mm, Height 70Mm, White, Capacity 150Ml, For Use With General Lab

I did not receive the pestle with this item, and it is not finished glazed on the interior - though the description does not specifically say it's glazed on the *inside*.I ORDERED THIS ITEM AND IT ARIVED WITHOUT A PESTLE. THE BOX ONLY INCLUDED A MORTAR AND I DO NOT KNOW WHO TO CONTACT. I WOULD ADVISE AGAINST ORDERING THIS PRODUCT.I received a broken set.The inside was NOT glazed like outside.
A porous inside grabs the pigment and transfers color

And ITS ALREADY BROKE!!

DONOT BUY !!!
